queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of loan duration in months to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the mitigating effect of critical accounts or other existing credits on credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of the contribution of the absence of a checking account to elevated credit risk.
